description_en: Ahmedabad may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 1 halal restaurants and 26 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Ahmedabad, India, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Ahmedabad: 16 halal restaurants listed, 26 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
